overlay_opacity.title: Overlay opacity
overlay_opacity.description: Adjust the darkness of the overlay above the desktop

background_blur.title: Background blur
background_blur.description: Blur the desktop background behind the menu in real time

animation_duration.title: Animation duration
animation_duration.description: Set the duration used by both opening and closing animations

group_columns.title: Tile bar columns
group_columns.description: Set how many tile bars are arranged across the screen

tiles_per_row.title: Tiles per row
tiles_per_row.description: Set how many tiles fit in one row within each group
